message:
feat(ddl): support safe column dropping for SQLite < 3.35 via table recreation

SQLite versions before 3.35 don't support ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN, requiring
a full table recreation sequence instead. This change threads table metadata
through the diff layer to enable that.

diff.rs:
- Add optional table_info field to DropColumn operation
- Populate table_info during column diff when schema info is available
- Update reverse() method and test cases for new field

ddl/mod.rs:
- Refactor generate_create_table() into generate_create_table_with_if_not_exists()
  with boolean parameter for SQLite recreation (no IF NOT EXISTS needed)

ddl/sqlite.rs:
- Implement full table recreation logic: CREATE new table, INSERT SELECT
  from old, DROP old table sequence for safe column drops

ddl/postgres.rs, ddl/mysql.rs:
- Update DropColumn pattern matches to ignore new optional field with ..

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
